channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Access Issues: News Corp Australia Blocks Bot Traffic
item.description: The article details an error message encountered by users attempting to access News Corp Australia websites, indicating they may have been detected as a crawler bot. News Corp Australia employs softwa...

item.title: Kamloops Liquor Store Employee Sexually Assaulted: RCMP Investigating
item.description: A Vancouver-based employee was sexually assaulted at a liquor store in Kamloops, British Columbia, according to RCMP reports. The incident, which occurred on July 11, 2026, has prompted a formal inves...

item.title: Certificate in Nursing in Kenya: Requirements, Colleges, and Fees
item.description: The article provides comprehensive information on pursuing a Certificate in Nursing in Kenya. It outlines the entry requirements, including a minimum KCSE mean grade of C- and specific subject combina...

item.title: How Music Powered Sudan’s 2019 Revolution
item.description: The article explores the pivotal role of music in Sudan's 2019 revolution, highlighting how it became a unifying force for protesters. It discusses how music cultivated anti-government sentiment and s...

item.title: Justin Bone's Mental State and RCMP Interaction Before Chinatown Murders
item.description: The article details the video evidence presented during the second-degree murder trial of Justin Bone, accused of the 2022 killings of Ban Phuc Hoang and Hung Trang in Edmonton. The 49-minute video, r...

item.title: Pitbull's Children and Family Life: Privacy and Protection
item.description: The article discusses the personal life of rapper Pitbull, focusing on his six children. It highlights how he maintains privacy for his family, revealing that two of his kids have public profiles whil...

item.title: Jennifer Garner's New Series Explores Grief, Friendship, and Culinary Healing
item.description: In 'The Five-Star Weekend,' Jennifer Garner portrays Hollis Shaw, a food blogger navigating grief by inviting friends to her Nantucket summer home. The series delves into themes of friendship, self-pr...

item.title: JMFyang aids Songbayanan's victory in 'Singko Blanko' contest

item.title: Venezuela Earthquakes: Over 4,300 Dead, 19,000 in Shelters
item.description: The death toll from Venezuela's devastating twin earthquakes last month has surpassed 4,300, according to National Assembly President Jorge Rodriguez. The 7.2 and 7.5 magnitude quakes on June 24 flatt...

item.title: Robbie Williams surprises CMAT during Bilbao BBK Live 2026 performance
item.description: During the second day of Bilbao BBK Live 2026, Robbie Williams made an unexpected appearance on stage during CMAT's set. Fresh from headlining the main stage earlier that night, Williams surprised bot...

item.title: Linda Noskova Wins Wimbledon, Dedicates Victory to Late Mother

item.title: Gloria Young Advocates for Live Theatre Over Streaming Culture
item.description: Gloria Young, Nollywood’s iconic 'Senior Girl' from the 1994 classic Glamour Girls, is critiquing the dominance of streaming culture and urging people to prioritize live theatre. In an interview, she ...

item.title: Springboks Triumph Over Scotland, Showcasing Rugby Depth and Progress
item.description: The Springboks delivered a commanding 42-28 victory over Scotland in a rugby Nations Championship clash at Loftus Versfeld Stadium, demonstrating their evolution as a team. Despite facing a resilient ...

item.description: The Roosters hosted the Eels in Round 19 of the 2026 NRL Premiership, delivering a high-octane encounter that showcased top-tier rugby league action. The match, which took place on July 11, 2026, feat...

item.title: PNP arrests 303 in cybercrime crackdown over three months
item.description: The Philippine National Police (PNP) has arrested 303 individuals in a three-month intensified campaign against cybercriminals, according to PNP chief Gen. Jose Melencio Nartatez Jr. The operation, wh...

item.title: Epstein Mocked Trump for Relying on His Plane Rides: Biographer Reveals Tensions
item.description: A biographer revealed that Jeffrey Epstein enjoyed humiliating Donald Trump for his reliance on Epstein's plane for transportation. During an episode of 'Inside Trump's Head,' biographer Michael Wolff...

item.title: Debugging Caching Issues in Vento and Eleventy: A Developer's Journey
item.description: The article details a developer's experience troubleshooting a caching issue in their Eleventy (11ty) setup using Vento as the templating language. The problem arose during local development when chan...

item.title: Norway vs England: World Cup 2026 quarter-final preview
item.description: The article provides a detailed preview of the World Cup 2026 quarter-final match between Norway and England. Key players such as Erling Haaland for Norway and Harry Kane for England are highlighted, ...

item.title: UFC 329 Betting Insights: McGregor vs. Holloway Rematch Analysis
item.description: The article provides detailed betting insights for UFC 329, focusing on the highly anticipated rematch between Conor McGregor and Max Holloway in Las Vegas. It analyzes key matchups, odds, and strateg...

item.title: Three siblings electrocuted at home in Quezon City
item.description: Three siblings aged 12, 15, and 19 died from electrocution at their rented apartment in Barangay Pinyahan, Quezon City. The incident occurred on Friday when Negra, 15, was electrocuted while hanging l...
